section.div: Fast, small, and fully autonomous AI assistant infrastructure — deploy anywhere, swap anything 🦀
OBLITERATE THE CHAINS THAT BIND YOU
The agent that grows with you
AoE2 Britons voice pack for peon-ping — monk, villager & wololo sounds for Claude Code
EVE (Wall-E) sound pack for PeonPing
Friends sound pack for OpenPeon/PeonPing
20 movie quote sound packs for PeonPing (CESP v1.0) — Big Lebowski, Office Space, Anchorman, Blues Brothers, Starship Troopers, Super Troopers, Zoolander
Hooking implementations and supporting tools for various coding agents (Claude, Cursor, Gemini, etc)
Demos, examples and utilities using PyMuPDF
A basic but usable python script to look at x509 certificates
Bridge Claude Code / Codex to IM platforms — chat with AI coding agents from Telegram, Discord, or Feishu/Lark.
An open-source, self-hosted AI code review bot powered by Vercel.
Open-source Agent Teams system with IM-based multi-Agent collaboration and human-in-the-loop oversight.
A quick demo of how fast your web server will start getting vigorously probed once you request a certificate
Design engineering for Claude Code. Craft, memory, and enforcement for consistent UI.
Beautiful & consistent icon toolkit made by the community. Open-source project and a fork of Feather Icons.
Agent skill that generates rich HTML pages or slide decks for diagrams, diff reviews, plan audits, data tables, and project recaps

Security proxy for AI agents. Scans every message for prompt injection, PII, and secrets. Defense-in-depth: Go proxy + iptables firewall + eBPF kernel monitor. YAML policy engine, audit logging, 5 AI agents with RAG knowledge bases.
π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

Bridge local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms (Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, WeChat Work). Chat with your AI dev assistant from anywhere — no public IP required for most platforms.
🐾 One-command multi-agent setup for OpenClaw — 9 specialized AI agents, group routing, safe config merge.
Real-time global intelligence dashboard — AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
the only cheat sheet you need
Apps for the Cheap Yellow Display
Control esp cyd with mcp
Cheap Yellow Display System Monitor using Glances API

Board definitions for the Sunton Smart display boards (CYD Cheap Yellow Display). These definitions contain not only contain the CPU information but also the connections and devices present on the board.
Online Tuya Devices Manager for Cheap Yellow Display (CYD) boards.
Interactive fluid simulation using the "CYD" dev board, featuring an ESP32. Built in Arduino.
ESP32 (CYD) kernel based firmware with 'penetration testing' packeges.
Staggeringly powerful macOS desktop automation with Lua
Your Personal AI Assistant; easy to install, deploy on your own machine or on the cloud; supports multiple chat apps with easily extensible capabilities.
A desktop GUI for Claude Code — chat, code, and manage projects visually. Built with Electron + Next.js.
Agentic orchestrator for parallel coding agents — plans tasks, spawns agents, and autonomously handles CI fixes, merge conflicts, and code reviews.
LVGL PlatformIO template for CYD variants
A serial terminal running on a Cheap Yellow Display
Standalone DX Cluster & Propagation Monitor. ESP32-2432S028R (CYD) touchscreen accessory with HamAlert integration.
This project allows a ‘Cheap Yellow Display’ to be used as a GPS speedometer.
This project is a GUI display for monitoring temperature and humidity using an ESP32 Cheap yellow display, and a DHT11 sensor.
Wifi Marauder for the 2.8'' ESP32 Module ESP32-2432S028R WiFi+BT Dual-core 240X320 Smart Display. Better know as the CYD.
Clock For Amateur Radio Operators using a CYD (Cheap Yellow Display)
"🐈 nanobot: The Ultra-Lightweight OpenClaw"
Replace port numbers with stable, named .localhost URLs. For humans and agents.
wip
Per-project Postgres instances with instant snapshot & restore to support yolo development methods
A super light-weight embedded code mcp (AST based) that just works - saves 70% token and improves speed for coding agent. 🌟 Star if you like it!
Never leave Claude Code waiting. Access your sessions from terminal, VS Code, browser, or phone - same session, any device, zero interruption.
Probabilistic dice triggers for Claude Code hooks
👀 A modern watch command. Time machine and pager etc.
A list of free LLM inference resources accessible via API.
A comprehensive guide to Palantir Foundry's Ontology strategy. / 世界最強のデータプラットフォーム「パランティア」の中核概念である『オントロジー』の戦略と実装を解き明かすOSS書籍プロジェクト。
practice made claude perfect
Hundreds of models & providers. One command to find what runs on your hardware.
simple terminal UI for git commands
🎃 A fast, out-of-the-box terminal built for AI coding.
Keep your secrets hidden from AI agents.
Agentic authentication including SSO examples for all major frameworks
Leash by StrongDM - take your AI agents for a walk
nlspec of StrongDM's Attractor, a non-interactive Coding Agent sufficient for use in a Software Factory
A plain-text life operating system powered by Claude Code. Inspired by Carmack's .plan files and Franklin's systematic self-improvement.
User friendly, high performance Windows 11 Virtual Machine on ARM Linux
Raspberry Pi App Store for Open Source Projects
Quickly create and run optimised Windows, macOS and Linux virtual machines
Generate audiobooks from e-books, voice cloning & 1158+ languages!
Andrej Karpathy skills for your Cursor or VS Code editor
Python Fire is a library for automatically generating command line interfaces (CLIs) from absolutely any Python object.
Turn a Time-of-Flight sensor into a 3D Scanner
Accomplish™ is the open source Al coworker that lives on your desktop
A lightweight sandboxing tool for enforcing filesystem and network restrictions on arbitrary processes at the OS level, without requiring a container.
adding pre-recorded voice feedback so claude can talk back
Memory optimized python collections
Review and refine Git diffs before you push
Outcome driven agent development framework that evolves
Angie - drop-in replacement for nginx
Generative UI examples for: AG-UI, A2UI/Open-JSON-UI, and MCP Apps.
Burp Suite extension that adds built-in MCP tooling, AI-assisted analysis, privacy controls, passive and active scanning and more
Type `ralph "prompt"` to start open code in a ralph loop. Also supports a prompt file & status check. Open Code, Claude Code, Codex, Copilot
Render Mermaid graphs inside your terminal

Convert PDFs, EPUBs, DOCX, DOC, and TXT files into high-quality audiobooks using **Qwen3 TTS Voice Model** - an open-source voice synthesis system that excels at natural speech generation and voice cloning.
ComfyUI custom nodes for speech, voice cloning, and voice design based on Qwen3-TTS models
Qwen-Image is a powerful image generation foundation model capable of complex text rendering and precise image editing.
Qwen3-VL is the multimodal large language model series developed by Qwen team, Alibaba Cloud.
Qwen3-Coder is the code version of Qwen3, the large language model series developed by Qwen team.
Qwen3 is the large language model series developed by Qwen team, Alibaba Cloud.
Fast and memory-efficient exact attention

Qwen3-TTS is an open-source series of TTS models developed by the Qwen team at Alibaba Cloud, supporting stable, expressive, and streaming speech generation, free-form voice design, and vivid voice cloning.
Local Area Network discovery tool with an interactive Terminal User Interface (TUI) written in Go. Discover, explore, and understand your LAN in an intuitive way. Knock Knock.. who's there? 🚪
Open Source version of Claude Cowork with 500+ SaaS app integrations
A relative time formatting library, with no code.
Terraform Pull Request Automation
Terrateam is open-source GitOps infrastructure orchestration. It integrates with GitHub to automate Terraform, OpenTofu, CDKTF, Terragrunt, and Pulumi workflows through pull requests.
